function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read root and nested AGENTS.MD files before operating in 99_system and 50_finance lanes, and used exact invoice records for auditable calculation.
function.outcome_justification: Exact line-item matches for 'operator workflow discovery sprint' were found in four invoices; applying 'depuis le debut de December 2025' includes records dated 2025-12-01, 2025-12-29, and 2026-02-14 only, summing line_eur values to 1020.
